title: Action Creation via Web UI
content:
BFF->>BFF: Validate CSRF token
(X-CSRF header + session cookie)

API->>API: Extract JWT claims
TenantId, ActorId, LanguageId

API->>API: FluentValidation
required fields, enum ranges, lengths

API->>DB: SELECT workflow_definition
WHERE status='published' AND action_type=@type
(RLS tenant-scoped)

API->>DB: SELECT FOR UPDATE tenant_sequence
Generate ACT-{n} (row-level lock)

API->>DB: INSERT action + state_history + audit_event + regulatory_deadlines
(single transaction)
